tripperBlock.title: As a Tripper
tripperBlock.availableTrips: {count, plural, =0 {No available trips} one {# available trip} other {# available trips}}
tripperBlock.noAvailableTrips: {firstName} has no available trips at the moment.
tripperBlock.reviewsHeader: {count, plural, =0 {No reviews} one {# review · {average}} other {# reviews · {average}}}
tripperBlock.noReviews: {firstName} has not received any reviews as a Tripper yet. Be the first to travel with them.

shipperBlock.title: As a sender
shipperBlock.reviewsHeader: {count, plural, =0 {No reviews} one {# review} other {# reviews}}
shipperBlock.noReviews: {firstName} has not received any reviews as a sender yet.

sidebar.notifyNextTripHint: Receive an email when {firstName} publishes a new trip.
sidebar.followersCount: {count, plural, one {# person follows {firstName}} other {# people follow {firstName}}}

error.title: Something went wrong
error.message: Unable to load this profile right now. Please try again in a moment.

notFound.title: Profile not found
notFound.message: This profile does not exist or has been removed.
